name: Circular Hip Twists
preceding_figure_names: Alemana, Continuous Hip Twists, Natural Top, Rope Spinning, Three Alemanas, Three Threes
notes:
This may be danced with R to R hand hold following Alemana from Open Position. Then, change to normal L to R hand hold on step 5 of the following Advanced Hip Twist. Keep hand at waist level.
Slight natural hip movement is used.
Knees will not straighten fully.

steps.action: RF to side and slightly back
comments: Slight natural hip movement is used.
Hip turns more than upper body.
